## Express API Codebase Exploration Report

### 1. **Overall Project Structure**

```

│   └── routes/
│       ├── posts.ts           # Posts routes (CRUD)
│       └── comments.ts        # Comments routes (CRUD)

```

---

### 2. **Main App Entry Point**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775339544240-zb51tw/src/server.ts`

- **Port:** 3000 (from environment variable or hardcoded default)
- **Imports app from `app.ts`**
- Simple listener setup with console log message

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775339544240-zb51tw/src/app.ts`

- Initializes Express app
- Uses `express.json()` middleware for JSON body parsing
- Applies logger middleware globally
- Mounts routes:
  - `/posts` → postsRouter
  - `/comments` → commentsRouter (no prefix)
- Includes health check endpoint `GET /health`

---

### 3. **Existing Routes**

#### **Posts Routes** (`/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775339544240-zb51tw/src/routes/posts.ts`)

| Method | Endpoint | Description | Status |
|--------|----------|-------------|--------|
| GET | `/posts` | List all posts | 200 |
| GET | `/posts/:id` | Get single post by ID | 200/404 |
| POST | `/posts` | Create new post | 201 (requires title, content, optional userId) |
| PUT | `/posts/:id` | Update post (title/content) | 200/404 |
| DELETE | `/posts/:id` | Delete post | 200/404 |

**Important:** Currently has NO authentication - anyone can create/update/delete posts.

#### **Comments Routes** (`/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775339544240-zb51tw/src/routes/comments.ts`)

| Method | Endpoint | Description | Status |
|--------|----------|-------------|--------|
| GET | `/posts/:postId/comments` | List comments for a post | 200/404 |
| GET | `/comments/:id` | Get single comment by ID | 200/404 |
| POST | `/posts/:postId/comments` | Create comment on post | 201 (requires body, optional userId) |
| PUT | `/comments/:id` | Update comment (body) | 200/404 |
| DELETE | `/comments/:id` | Delete comment | 200/404 |

**Important:** Currently has NO authentication - anyone can comment/delete comments.

---

### 4. **Existing Middleware**

**File:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775339544240-zb51tw/src/middleware/logger.ts`

### 7. **Test Files and Structure**

Testing framework: **Vitest** with **Supertest** for HTTP testing

#### **A. Posts Tests** (`/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775339544240-zb51tw/tests/posts.test.ts`)

- Basic CRUD tests (no auth requirements yet)
- Tests: GET /posts, GET /posts/:id, /health endpoint
- Expects 4+ posts in seed data
- Validates post shape (id, title, content, userId, createdAt)

#### **B. Comments Tests** (`/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775339544240-zb51tw/tests/comments.test.ts`)

- Fetches comments by post ID
- Gets single comments
- Validates comment shape (id, postId, userId, body, createdAt)
- Tests error handling for non-existent resources

#### **C. Auth Tests** (`/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775339544240-zb51tw/tests/auth.test.ts`)

**COMPREHENSIVE TEST SUITE - This defines what you need to implement!**

Tests cover 5 major sections:

**1. Registration (`POST /auth/register`)**
- Creates new user with username, email, password
- Returns 201 with JWT token (3-part format check)
- Returns user object without password
- Rejects duplicate usernames (409)
- Rejects missing fields (400)

**2. Login (`POST /auth/login`)**
- Authenticates with username and password
- Returns 200 with JWT token on success
- Returns 401 for invalid password
- Returns 401 for non-existent user

**3. Protected Routes (Bearer token in Authorization header)**
- `POST /posts` requires auth (401 without token)
- `POST /posts` with valid token creates post with userId from token
- `GET /posts` and `GET /posts/:id` are PUBLIC (no auth required)
- `PUT /posts/:id` requires auth (401 without token)
- `DELETE /posts/:id` requires auth (401 without token)

**4. Ownership/Authorization**
- Users can update/delete only their own posts
- Others get 403 Forbidden when trying to modify someone else's post
- Tests with two different users (alice_owner, bob_owner)

**5. Comment Protection**
- `POST /posts/:postId/comments` requires auth (401)
- `GET /posts/:postId/comments` is PUBLIC
- Users can delete only their own comments
- Others get 403 when trying to delete someone else's comment

**Test Pattern:**
```typescript
// Auth header format
.set("Authorization", `Bearer ${token}`)
```

## Summary for JWT Auth Implementation

### What Currently Exists
